localization.conditional_monitoring_statement: The sparse combined arm covers opaque transported tension plus regenerative-node innovation residuals. Agreement with full graph is empirical under this declared generator, not a global theorem.
localization.regenerated_value_boundary: Opaque-only monitoring has no theorem-level claim for regenerated drift; any power loss is reported as a boundary result.

tamper_matrix.structural_basis: every closed top-level manifest and GoldenCase field plus cross-file hashes
